primary.description: Metallic Gold / Mustard - Use for primary actions, 'Urgent' buttons, and accents.

secondary.description: Warm Stone White - Main background color.

accent.description: Stone 100 - Used for secondary buttons and card backgrounds.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-white hover:bg-[#B5952F] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-soft hover:shadow-hover
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-stone-200 text-stone-900 hover:bg-stone-50 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.urgent: bg-[#D4AF37] text-white hover:bg-[#B5952F] rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-sm shadow-lg animate-pulse-slow
buttons.future: bg-stone-100 text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-200 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium text-sm

cards.artisan: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-stone-100 shadow-soft hover:shadow-hover transition-all duration-300 p-6 flex flex-col gap-4 group
cards.chat_bubble_user: bg-[#D4AF37] text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-4 max-w-[80%] self-end shadow-sm
cards.chat_bubble_ai: bg-white border border-stone-100 text-stone-800 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-6 max-w-[80%] self-start shadow-soft

inputs.search_hero: w-full text-lg p-6 rounded-2xl border-0 shadow-float focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D4AF37]/20 placeholder:text-stone-400 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-sm transition-all

badges.verified: inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-[#D4AF37]/10 text-[#D4AF37] border border-[#D4AF37]/20

elements: Hero Section: Large typography + Central Input + Photo Upload
Background: Subtle warm gradient or blurred interior image

results_page.mobile: List View with 'Show Map' floating button

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building a 'Premium Local Concierge' service, not a tech startup. Avoid 'SaaS' tropes like gradients, dark mode, and complex dashboards. Focus on warmth, clarity, and trust.
instructions_to_main_agent.map_integration: Use 'react-leaflet'. Style the map tiles to be muted/grayscale so the Gold pins pop. Do not use default OpenStreetMap colors if possible (use a filter).
instructions_to_main_agent.chat_flow: The chat is the core. It should feel like texting a knowledgeable friend. Use 'typing' indicators. Limit the AI to 3 questions max.
instructions_to_main_agent.animations: Use 'framer-motion' for smooth entrance of chat bubbles and artisan cards. No bouncy springs. Use 'easeOut' curves.
instructions_to_main_agent.accessibility: Ensure the Gold color (#D4AF37) is only used on white backgrounds for large text or icons. For body text, use darker shades or black.

do_not: Do not use 'Inter' font for headings. Use 'Fraunces'.
Do not use pure black (#000000). Use Stone 900 (#1C1917).
Do not make the map full-screen on mobile by default (it traps scroll).
Do not use 'tech blue' or 'success green' as primary colors.
